completed_prs.title: Internal link graph dry-run read model

results.content_publish_rehearsal: Contract and dry-run validator completed. Rehearsal reports readiness, blockers, warnings, claim lint state, internal link readiness, Search Channel eligibility dry-run state, and planned observation events without publishing or writing.
results.internal_link_graph: Backend/CMS authority contract and dry-run read model completed. It reports source inventory, graph family counts, entity-key gaps, legacy_unpaired count, candidate opportunities, unsafe fallback sources, and warnings without creating links.
results.chinese_claim_linter: Contract and runtime completed. The linter classifies safe, needs_review, and blocked candidate copy, maps severity where context is available, supports bundled fixtures, and does not auto-rewrite or mutate CMS content.
results.ops_seo_readiness: Future /ops/seo read-only sections and hard stops are defined without implementing UI, action buttons, write controls, raw data display, or Metabase exposure.
results.ledger: PR7 merged state is reconciled and this closeout remains docs/generated/test/state only.
